content.speakerText: Could you point me to where I can get a city map?
content.speakerTextCn: 你能告诉我哪里可以拿到城市地图吗？
expectedAnswers: Sure! There’s a rack just by the entrance — all maps are free.
Of course! The tourist information desk to your left has plenty.
You can find one at the front desk, or download the official app if you prefer.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰指引地图获取位置或方式
语言准确性：是否使用正确介词、动词搭配（point me to, get a map）
表达自然度：是否使用口语化但礼貌的表达，避免机械式回答
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'map', 'free', 'where', 'get' 等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 游客在旅游信息中心向工作人员礼貌索取一份城市地图，并准备结束对话
content.speakerText: Could I please get a free map of the city? Also, thanks so much for your help!
content.speakerTextCn: 我能要一份免费的城市地图吗？另外，非常感谢你的帮助！
expectedAnswers: Of course! Here you go — enjoy your trip!
Sure! Take one from the rack near the door. Have a wonderful day!
Absolutely! This one has the subway routes marked too. Have a great time!
No problem! Feel free to come back if you need more info. Safe travels!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达了索取地图和表达感谢的双重意图
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无明显错误
表达自然度：语气礼貌、符合英语口语习惯，不生硬
关键词覆盖：使用了 'map', 'free', 'thanks', 'trip/visit' 等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 游客在酒店前台向工作人员请求一张当地景点地图，并礼貌道别
content.speakerText: Would it be possible to get a city map? I really appreciate your assistance!
content.speakerTextCn: 我可以要一张城市地图吗？非常感谢你的帮助！
expectedAnswers: Certainly! Here’s a detailed one with walking tours highlighted. Have a fantastic time!
Of course — we have them by the entrance. Thanks for choosing us!
Yes, here you are! Let me know if you need recommendations later. Enjoy your stay!
Absolutely! This map includes hidden gems too. Thanks for stopping by!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达了索取地图和表达感谢的双重意图
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无明显错误
表达自然度：语气礼貌、符合英语口语习惯，不生硬
关键词覆盖：使用了 'map', 'city', 'appreciate', 'help', 'enjoy' 等场景关键词
